inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 cash from operations $2,904M less capital spending $621M, divided by 443.8M weighted-average diluted shares (10-K filed 2026-02-12)
inputs.normalization_note: Owner cash uses cash from operations minus property, plant and equipment purchases ($621M). FY2025 investing cash flow was positive ($748M) on divestiture proceeds; Lawrence base uses maintenance capex only, not M&A cash.

bear.notes: U.S. companion animal softness persists; Librela OA franchise flat; livestock normalizes; leverage limits buybacks

base.notes: 2026 guidance +3-5% operational revenue and +3-6% adjusted net income; Simparica and international companion offset U.S. dermatology pressure; share count falls ~2% annually

bull.notes: Librela re-acceleration; Long-Acting Cytopoint and Simparica DUO launches; livestock ex-MFA sustains high single digits; buybacks continue at scale

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Animal health compounder; intangibles $998M and goodwill on balance sheet reflect acquisitions, not hidden land/NAV (10-K FY2025)

option_scan.question: Undeveloped reserves / dormant royalty?
option_scan.evidence: Operating pharma; pipeline valued through R&D spend ($698M FY2025)

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.evidence: Companion animal and livestock segments both revenue-positive; gross profit $4,255M on $9,467M revenue (10-K)

option_scan.question: Backlog / pipeline not in FCF path?
option_scan.evidence: Expected blockbusters: Long-Acting Cytopoint, Simparica DUO (Q4 FY2025 presentation); upside in bull only

option_scan.question: Private or illiquid stakes below fair value?
Transitory distribution / legal recovery?
option_scan.evidence: Operating compounder; routine product liability reserves

option_scan.question: Embedded product option already in revenue?
option_scan.evidence: Simparica franchise (+12% operational FY2025), Apoquel/Cytopoint dermatology (+6%) already in segment revenue

growth_explanation.mechanism: Companion animal parasiticides and dermatology (Simparica Trio, Apoquel, Cytopoint) compound per-share cash; international companion and livestock offset periodic U.S. softness; buybacks amplify EPS.
growth_explanation.base_growth_source: FY2025 revenue +2% reported / +3% operational; 2026 guidance +3-5% operational revenue (Q4 FY2025 presentation)
growth_explanation.bear_trigger: Prolonged U.S. companion decline and Librela OA franchise stagnation
growth_explanation.bull_trigger: New blockbuster launches and livestock ex-MFA sustain high single-digit growth with continued $3B+ repurchases
